user.title: Hurricane Tracker
user.description: Track tropical cyclones worldwide (NHC for the Atlantic & Pacific, GDACS elsewhere). Set your home location and options.

data.range: Range for “within range” (in your chosen units)

abort.single_instance_allowed: Hurricane Tracker is already set up.

data.range: Range for “within range” (in your chosen units)

blind_outage.title: Storm data unavailable during an active storm
blind_outage.description: Hurricane Tracker knows a storm is active but can't currently show it: the data feed ({sources}) has been unreachable long enough that the last cached forecast has expired. This usually clears on its own once the feed responds. If it persists, check your internet connection and whether the source is up. This notice clears automatically when data returns.
